topStories.title: As Iran claims downing second F-35 fighter jet, here is a look at US military aircraft lost during Operation Epic Fury
topStories.description: US military assets worth up to $2.9 billion have been lost as the Pentagon seeks $200 billion for operations. Iran asserts it shot down a US F-35, contradicting US Central Command's claim of an emergency landing. The conflict leads to significant military losses on both sides.

topStories.title: When will the Iran war end? Tracing the Trump administration's timelines
topStories.description: Experts say many US presidents have offered a timeline for a conflict - only to then shift their estimates.

dailyNews.title: In BJP’s Assam poll narrative, Pakistan is the protagonist, ‘anti-national’ a leitmotif
dailyNews.description: Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma has been attacking Congress leader Gaurav Gogoi over his alleged Pakistan connections, his latest barb was aimed at the mother of a candidate whom he accused of sympathising with ‘anti-national’ elements

dailyNews.title: 5 Indians among 12 injured in Abu Dhabi after falling debris hits Ajban area
dailyNews.description: Eight Indians have been killed and dozens more injured in countries across the region since the Israel and the US’s military strikes on Iran on February 28

dailyNews.title: ‘Hand over enemy pilot’: Iranian state TV affiliate claims a US pilot ejected from their aircraft over southwestern Iran
dailyNews.description: An on-screen crawl earlier urged the public to ‘shoot them if you see them,’ referring to social media footage circulating of what appeared to be US aircraft in the area, reports stated

dailyNews.title: US jobs surge unexpectedly in March despite Iran war
dailyNews.description: Employers added 178,000 jobs, far more than had expected, the Labor Department says.

dailyNews.title: Donald Trump's New Title For JD Vance: "Fraud Czar". What That Means
dailyNews.description: Trump said that the focus of his work will be "everywhere" but primarily in Democratic-run states, singling out California, Illinois and Minnesota.

dailyNews.title: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
dailyNews.description: Six weapons experts have contested the US claim that video evidence suggests an Iranian missile could have hit the hall.

dailyNews.title: Is NATO Still Run By US As Trump Calls It 'Paper Tiger', Threatens To Exit?
dailyNews.description: Trump's latest statement questioning NATO's role is linked to the organisation's refusal to back the US during the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: US Adds 178,000 Jobs, More Than Expected, Unemployment Drops
dailyNews.description: An index of hiring plans among small businesses held steady in March at one of the lowest levels in recent years.

dailyNews.title: Congress Names 27 Candidates For Tamil Nadu Polls, State Chief Among Nominees
dailyNews.description: The Congress will contest 28 out of 234 Assembly seats in Tamil Nadu in a coalition with the ruling DMK.

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi ouster: How Epstein Files plagued her time as US Attorney General—A timeline
dailyNews.description: Pam Bondi's term as US Attorney General ended with her dismissal by Trump amid controversy over the release of Epstein-related documents. Bondi dismissed criticism of how she handled the issue, while Trump lauded her as ‘a Great American Patriot and a loyal friend’.

dailyNews.title: NY prosecutor sidesteps sanctuary law and coordinates ICE arrest of Guatemalan child rape suspect
dailyNews.description: A New York prosecutor used a legal loophole to coordinate an ICE arrest of a suspected child rapist, bypassing the state's sanctuary and no-bail policies.

dailyNews.title: Dem lawmaker busted on camera slipping into bash with reality TV stars as Americans feel shutdown pain
dailyNews.description: Democrat Rep. Seth Magaziner was caught sneaking into a "Real Housewives of Rhode Island" watch party amid the government shutdown before Easter travel.

dailyNews.title: State top cop moves to crush alleged DHS records restriction as county denies ICE-out
dailyNews.description: Montana AG tells Gallatin County its refusal to recognize ICE as a criminal justice agency is legally wrong, warning 'Montana is not California.'

dailyNews.title: Trump eyes next attorney general as key GOP senator signals potential roadblock
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's firing of Attorney General Pam Bondi sets up another Senate confirmation battle, with Sen. Thom Tillis , R-N.C., drawing a firm line on Jan. 6.

dailyNews.title: Feds charge illegal immigrant in Loyola student killing as attorney says prosecutors lack 'faith' in state
dailyNews.description: New federal charges filed against the illegal immigrant accused of fatally shooting 18-year-old Loyola University Chicago student Sheridan Gorman.

dailyNews.title: Vanessa Trump breaks silence on social media with supportive message after Tiger Woods' DUI arrest
dailyNews.description: Vanessa Trump broke her silence on social media to show support for Tiger Woods following his DUI arrest in Florida and rollover car crash.

dailyNews.title: NYC schools track bathroom time with digital hall passes
dailyNews.description: New York City public schools are rolling out SmartPass, a digital hall pass system that tracks student movement, sparking privacy concerns.

dailyNews.title: Dem congressional nominee Bobby Pulido faces scrutiny over years performing with convicted child sex offender
dailyNews.description: Texas Democratic nominee Bobby Pulido faces scrutiny over touring with Frankie Caballero, who was convicted of indecent contact with an 8-year-old girl.

dailyNews.title: Holocaust survivor, 86, priced out of NYC says Mamdani skipped scheduled housing meeting
dailyNews.description: An 86-year-old Holocaust survivor says NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani failed to follow through on a promised housing meeting as costs soar.

dailyNews.title: WATCH: House Democrat gets unexpected response when he asks constituents about voter ID requirements
dailyNews.description: Rep. Shomari Figures ignited online criticism after remarks at a town hall on voter ID seemed to undercut Democratic opposition to photo ID rules.

dailyNews.title: Blackburn urges IRS probe of Planned Parenthood's tax-exempt status over Botox treatments
dailyNews.description: Sen. Marsha Blackburn is urging an IRS investigation into Planned Parenthood affiliates reportedly offering Botox while operating as tax-exempt nonprofits.

topStories.description: Pam Bondi had a feeling her days as attorney general were numbered. But she didn’t expect President Trump to drop the curtain quite so soon.

topStories.title: Who Is Todd Blanche, Trump’s Acting Attorney General?
topStories.description: While it remains unclear how long Todd Blanche will stay in the job, whoever ends up taking over permanently will lead a department that he has shaped in his own image.

topStories.title: The Awe of a Moon Launch in an Age of Trump, Turmoil and Tribal Divisions
topStories.description: The launch of Artemis II captured the tenor of the times in a country that can still do big things but seems forever mired in big problems.

topStories.title: Liberal Group Warns That Trump Could Have Two More Supreme Court Picks
topStories.description: Demand Justice plans to tie Republicans running for Senate this year to a possible fight to fill vacancies that could emerge on the Supreme Court.

topStories.title: Trump's 2027 budget asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending
topStories.description: President Trump's new budget proposal asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending — a 42% increase — while cutting nondefense spending by $73 billion, or 10%.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo comments on Trump's Iran war during first Easter of papacy
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo is celebrating the first Easter of his papacy. CBS News' Chris Livesay reports.

dailyNews.title: Did Pam Bondi's handling of the Epstein files lead to Trump firing her?
dailyNews.description: President Trump's firing of Attorney General Pam Bondi is raising questions about their dynamic in the months prior. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
dailyNews.description: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's Iran speech ignores the risks of a return to the 1970s
dailyNews.description: Oil shocks crippled past presidencies. The Iran war is putting Trump into the danger zone.

dailyNews.title: One year on from Trump's 'liberation day,' global investors are rethinking American exceptionalism
dailyNews.description: U.S. exceptionalism is "no longer automatic" among global investors, one market watcher told CNBC.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: US jet appears to have been shot down by Iran, US official says
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: White House asks for record-breaking $1.5 trillion for defense in 2027 budget request
dailyNews.description: The White House is asking Congress to approve roughly $1.5 trillion for defense -- a record-breaking amount as the U.S. remains in its fifth week of war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
